name: bpmct
html: bpmct
css: .bpmct-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0a0018 0%, #1a0a00 60%, #2a1200 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; gap: 4%; } .bpmct-center { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; position: relative; z-index: 2; flex-shrink: 0; } .bpmct-text { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 8vw, 4rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6a00 0%, #ff9a00 30%, #ffcc00 55%, #ff7a00 80%, #ff4500 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); animation: bpmct-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); } 50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 32px #ffaa00) drop-shadow(0 0 70px #ff6a00); } } .bpmct-fireball { position: relative; width: clamp(40px, 14%, 70px); height: clamp(40px, 14%, 70px); margin-bottom: clamp(-10px, -3%, -5px); display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .bpmct-flame { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); border-radius: 50% 50% 30% 30%; animation: bpmct-flicker 0.18s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .bpmct-flame-outer { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%, #ff2200 0%, #ff6600 40%, #ffaa00 70%, transparent 100%); opacity: 0.85; animation-delay: 0s; } .bpmct-flame-mid { width: 70%; height: 80%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%, #ff5500 0%, #ffaa00 50%, #ffee00 80%, transparent 100%); opacity: 0.9; animation-delay: 0.06s; } .bpmct-flame-core { width: 40%; height: 60%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 90%, #ffffff 0%, #ffffaa 40%, #ffee00 70%, transparent 100%); opacity: 1; animation-delay: 0.12s; } @keyframes bpmct-flicker { 0% { transform: translateX(-50%) scaleX(1) scaleY(1); } 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) scaleX(0.88) scaleY(1.08); } } .bpmct-spark { position: absolute; width: clamp(3px, 1vw, 5px); height: clamp(3px, 1vw, 5px); border-radius: 50%; background: #ffee00; animation: bpmct-spark-fly 0.9s ease-out infinite; } .bpmct-spark.s1 { left: 15%; animation-delay: 0s; --dx: -18px; --dy: -28px; } .bpmct-spark.s2 { left: 75%; animation-delay: 0.22s; --dx: 14px; --dy: -32px; } .bpmct-spark.s3 { left: 50%; animation-delay: 0.44s; --dx: -8px; --dy: -38px; } .bpmct-spark.s4 { left: 35%; animation-delay: 0.66s; --dx: 20px; --dy: -24px; } @keyframes bpmct-spark-fly { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(var(--dx), var(--dy)) scale(0.2); } } .bpmct-ember { position: absolute; width: clamp(2px, 0.6vw, 4px); height: clamp(2px, 0.6vw, 4px); border-radius: 50%; background: #ff6600; animation: bpmct-ember-rise 1.4s ease-out infinite; } .bpmct-ember.e1 { left: 30%; animation-delay: 0.1s; --dx: -12px; --dy: -44px; } .bpmct-ember.e2 { left: 60%; animation-delay: 0.5s; --dx: 10px; --dy: -50px; } .bpmct-ember.e3 { left: 48%; animation-delay: 0.9s; --dx: -4px; --dy: -42px; } @keyframes bpmct-ember-rise { 0% { opacity: 0.9; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(var(--dx), var(--dy)) scale(0.1); } } .bpmct-palm { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; width: clamp(30px, 10%, 60px); height: 70%; flex-shrink: 0; animation: bpmct-sway 3.5s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: bottom center; } .bpmct-palm-r { animation-delay: -1.2s; } .bpmct-trunk { width: 18%; height: 80%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a3a10 0%, #8b5e1a 40%, #6b4510 100%); border-radius: 4px 4px 2px 2px; } .bpmct-fronds { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 0; height: 0; } .bpmct-frond { position: absolute; width: clamp(18px, 6vw, 40px); height: clamp(5px, 1.5vw, 10px); background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a7a10 0%, #2ecc20 40%, #1a9a10 100%); border-radius: 0 50% 50% 0; transform-origin: 0% 50%; } .bpmct-frond.f1 { transform: rotate(-60deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f2 { transform: rotate(-30deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f3 { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f4 { transform: rotate(30deg) translateX(2px); } .bpmct-frond.f5 { transform: rotate(60deg) translateX(2px); } @keyframes bpmct-sway { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-4deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(4deg); } }
